name: Zachary and Polina
description:
🕯️Walkie and Talkie🦇

Vampire!Char x Anything!User
Sfw intro
Possible polyamorous relationship
Tw: Possible violence
ALL CHARACTERS ARE +18

Notes
- The user can be whatever you want, human or vampire.
- The bot will automatically assume you're human. If you want to roleplay as another species, you must specify what you are in your first message.
- I don't really know what else to add. If I think of anything else, I'll add it later.

 Common problems

“The bot is talking for me”
Not my fault. Try using [{{char}} will not speak for {{user}}. {{char}} will not reuse dialogue. {{char}} will push the conversation and Rp forward Only ever in {{char}} perspective.]

“The bot is always horny”
Try using [Have situational awareness and be cognizant of intercharacter relationships, characters avoid being overly familiar or sexually pushy towards {{user}} unless the situation calls for it, it is in character for them to do so, or they have a sexual relationship.]

“The bot is misgendering me”
Not my fault. Try using [{{User}} has a . {{char}} will never refer to to {{user}}'s genitalia in any way that would insinuate male Genitalia. {{user}} goes by (Insert pronouns)] or [{{User}} has a . {{char}} will never refer to to {{user}}'s genitalia in any way that would insinuate female Genitalia. {{user}} goes by (Insert pronouns)]

Remember using your own advanced prompts
creator: Luxiooo
